LightningComponentBundle.description: SLDS 2 compliant page header component with configurable title subtitle and action buttons. Supports accessibility and responsive design.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Page Header with Title and Action

property.name: title
property.label: Title
property.description: Main title displayed in the page header

property.name: subtitle
property.label: Subtitle
property.description: Optional subtitle or metadata text displayed below the title

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: Optional icon name in format category:name (e.g., standard:account)

property.name: iconAlternativeText
property.label: Icon Alt Text
property.description: Alternative text for the icon for accessibility

property.name: primaryActionLabel
property.label: Primary Action Label
property.description: Label text for the primary action button

property.name: secondaryActionLabel
property.label: Secondary Action Label
property.description: Label text for the secondary action button

property.name: showPrimaryAction
property.label: Show Primary Action
property.description: Toggle visibility of the primary action button

property.name: showSecondaryAction
property.label: Show Secondary Action
property.description: Toggle visibility of the secondary action button
